_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: cNF height measurements were significantly higher by LifeViz Micro than Cherry Imaging (Z = −5.579, p < 0.001)... median (IQR) height was 1.43 (0.77–2.37) mm measured by LifeViz Micro and 1.33 (0.77–1.66) mm
details: Measured significantly higher cNF heights than Cherry Imaging with median height of 1.43 mm vs 1.33 mm (p < 0.001)
